_doc: RRDSD Fork: +multi-teacher (Codex R3 Path C probe). Competitive argmax routing across SmolLM2 + Pythia. Warm-start from r1b best. 300-step probe. Promotion: Pythia wins >=10% of retained positions AND eval improves >=0.003 BPB vs lite-control.

_notes.mechanism: RRDSD-lite + per-position argmax_m U_m,t routing across SmolLM2 anchor + Pythia aux. Winner's probs used in forward-KL at T_loss=0.7.
_notes.codex_r3_promotion: Promoted to R2-full only if Pythia wins >=10% of retained positions (rr_win_1 stat) AND eval improves by >=0.003 BPB vs lite-control at step +300.
_notes.implementation: Per-teacher byte prob collection from teacher_results before aggregation. argmax over U_m,t = A_m × sqrt(D_m + eps). Stats rr_win_0 (SmolLM2) and rr_win_1 (Pythia) track per-teacher selection fraction.
